title: Best Librarian's Trades
description: This datapack overhauls the Librarian’s trades
body:
### 🌟 **The Best Custom Villager Trades for Enchanted Books!**

Tired of endlessly resetting librarians to get Mending, Sharpness V, or Efficiency V upgrades? This datapack overhauls the Librarian’s trades, offering **powerful enchantments at balanced prices**—no more grinding, just fair trading!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a413774478df98183184d07dc12da7280b91c4da.jpeg)

### **Requires:**[VillagerConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagerconfig)

### **⚙️ Installation**
1. Install the VillagerConfig
2. Download the .zip file  
2. Place it in your world's datapacks folder  
3. In-game, run /reload or restart your world  
4. Create a librarian - find or spawn a villager near a lectern  
5. Enjoy your new trading system!

### Note:
After creating a librarian and a traded with him, you can delete Data Pack and Mod, and a villager will remain in your world with all trades.
